faqSection.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqSection.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our practice
faqSection.a1: We treat a wide range of conditions including fever, cold, cough, digestive issues, skin problems, allergies, lifestyle disorders, women's health concerns, and more. Our holistic approach addresses both acute and chronic conditions.
faqSection.q2: Do I need a prior appointment?
faqSection.a2: While walk-ins are welcome, we recommend booking an appointment to minimize your waiting time. You can book online through our website or via WhatsApp.
faqSection.q3: Can follow-up consultations be scheduled online?
faqSection.a3: Yes! Follow-up consultations can be conveniently scheduled online. We also offer WhatsApp consultations for quick follow-ups and health queries.
faqSection.a4: We provide consultations in English, Hindi, Gujarati, and Marathi to ensure clear communication and comfort for all patients.
faqSection.q5: Do you provide preventive healthcare guidance?
faqSection.a5: Absolutely! Preventive healthcare is at the core of our practice. We offer health screenings, lifestyle counseling, dietary guidance, and wellness plans to help you stay healthy.

about.title: About Dr. Kajal Patil
about.subtitle: Your Trusted Family Physician in Surat
about.bio1: Dr. Kajal Patil is a dedicated General Physician with a BHMS degree, passionate about providing compassionate, patient-centered healthcare. She believes in treating the whole person — not just the symptoms — through a holistic approach that combines modern medical knowledge with time-tested wellness practices.
about.bio2: With a strong commitment to continuous learning and staying updated with the latest in healthcare, Dr. Kajal ensures every patient receives the most effective and personalized care possible.
about.bio3: Her clinic in Surat is designed to be a welcoming space where patients feel comfortable, heard, and cared for. Whether it's a routine checkup or managing a complex health concern, Dr. Kajal approaches every consultation with empathy, patience, and thoroughness.
about.missionText: To provide accessible, compassionate, and high-quality healthcare that empowers patients to lead healthier, happier lives through personalized treatment and preventive care.
about.value1Desc: Every patient is treated with kindness, empathy, and respect.
about.value2Desc: Committed to the highest standards of medical care and continuous improvement.
about.value3Desc: Honest, transparent communication and ethical medical practice.
about.value4Desc: Treating the whole person — body, mind, and spirit.
about.value5Desc: Making quality healthcare available and approachable for everyone.
about.value6Desc: Educating and empowering patients to take charge of their health.
about.t1Desc: Completed Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine & Surgery with distinction.
about.t2Desc: Extensive hands-on clinical training across multiple healthcare specialties.
about.t3Desc: Established Healing Harmony Clinic in Surat, dedicated to holistic patient care.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive healthcare services designed for your wellbeing
services.generalConsultationDesc: Thorough medical evaluations and personalized treatment plans for a wide range of health concerns.
services.feverManagementDesc: Expert diagnosis and effective management of fevers, infections, and acute illnesses.
services.lifestyleDisordersDesc: Comprehensive care for diabetes management, hypertension, thyroid issues, and other lifestyle-related conditions.
services.preventiveHealthcareDesc: Proactive health screenings, risk assessments, and wellness plans to prevent disease before it starts.
services.womensWellnessDesc: Specialized care addressing women's health needs including hormonal health, nutrition, and wellness guidance.
services.routineCheckupsDesc: Regular comprehensive health assessments to monitor your health and catch potential issues early.
services.healthCounselingDesc: Guidance on nutrition, stress management, sleep hygiene, and healthy lifestyle practices.
services.followUpVisitsDesc: Consistent monitoring and care adjustments to ensure your treatment plan is working effectively.
services.vaccinationDesc: Expert advice on vaccination schedules, immunization, and preventive immunological care.
services.familyHealthcareDesc: Complete healthcare solutions for every family member — from infants to elderly.

testimonialsPage.title: Patient Testimonials
testimonialsPage.subtitle: Hear from those who experienced our care
testimonialsPage.t1: Dr. Kajal listened patiently and made me feel comfortable throughout the consultation. She explained everything in detail and I felt truly cared for.
testimonialsPage.t2: The best part about visiting Dr. Kajal is her calm demeanor and thorough approach. She doesn't rush and takes time to understand your concerns.
testimonialsPage.t3: I've been taking my entire family to Dr. Kajal. She's wonderful with kids and elderly alike. Truly a family doctor in every sense.
testimonialsPage.t4: Dr. Kajal's preventive healthcare approach helped me identify potential health risks early. Her guidance on lifestyle changes has been invaluable.
testimonialsPage.t5: As a working professional, I appreciate the same-day consultation facility. Dr. Kajal is always available when you need her.
testimonialsPage.t6: The clinic environment is so calming and welcoming. Dr. Kajal makes you feel at ease from the moment you walk in. Highly recommended!

prescription.title: Prescription Portal
prescription.subtitle: Download your prescription securely
prescription.info: Enter your prescription ID provided by Dr. Kajal Patil to access and download your prescription.
prescription.notFound: Prescription not found. Please check your ID and try again.
prescription.howTo: How to find your Prescription ID?
prescription.howToDesc: Your Prescription ID is provided at the end of your consultation. It starts with 'RX-' followed by a unique number. If you cannot find it, please contact us.
